notes: Exemplary artefact: problem is framed entirely as a forced migration under a hard vendor deadline with compounding regulatory risk (not a solution), six named personas with role/timing/cost detail, a tightly bounded MVP with explicit deferrals (new loan products, AI/ML, payment channels), five or more out-of-scope items each with clear reasons, genuine regulatory uncertainties (BS11 notification status, CCCFA retention confirmation on destination, schema mapping gaps) with stated risk-if-wrong, success indicators anchored to baselines (280,000 accounts, legacy report formats, T+6/T+12 deadlines), and ten constraints all sourced from operator input and injected regulatory context.
